---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for pTrack
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Darlington6
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Is your feature request related to a frustration? Please describe it clearly.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. How should it work? What should the user experience look like?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? Why are they insufficient?

## Acceptance Criteria

List the specific requirements this feature must meet to be considered complete:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, wireframes, references, or other context here.
